title: CFTR / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the rs74551128 AA genotype (two copies of the CFTR A455E variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information and CPIC guidelines indicate use of ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of A455E. Other genetic and clinical factors may also influence response to ivacaftor.
